name: justjs

scripts.build: bun run --filter '@justjs/network' --filter '@justjs/data' --filter '@justscript/core' build && bun run --filter '@justjs/transport' build && bun run --filter '@justjs/application' build && bun run --filter '@justscript/measurement' --filter '@justjs/aop-security' --filter '@justjs/aop-observability' --filter '@justjs/aop-i18n' --filter '@justjs/aop-flags' --filter '@justjs/aop-analytics' --filter '@justjs/aop-theming' --filter '@justjs/memory' --filter '@justjs/ai-assist' --filter '@justjs/cloud-connect' --filter '@justjs/scm-connect' --filter '@justjs/comms-connect' --filter '@justjs/social-connect' --filter '@justjs/pm-connect' --filter '@justjs/image-connect' --filter '@justjs/component-view' --filter '@justjs/platform-mobile' --filter '@justjs/platform-desktop' --filter '@justjs/platform-native' --filter '@justjs/vite' --filter '@justjs/ssr' --filter '@justjs/build' build && bun run --filter 'hello-justjs' build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter '@justjs/network' --filter '@justjs/data' --filter '@justscript/core' typecheck && bun run --filter '@justjs/transport' typecheck && bun run --filter '@justjs/application' typecheck && bun run --filter '@justscript/measurement' --filter '@justjs/aop-security' --filter '@justjs/aop-observability' --filter '@justjs/aop-i18n' --filter '@justjs/aop-flags' --filter '@justjs/aop-analytics' --filter '@justjs/aop-theming' --filter '@justjs/memory' --filter '@justjs/ai-assist' --filter '@justjs/cloud-connect' --filter '@justjs/scm-connect' --filter '@justjs/comms-connect' --filter '@justjs/social-connect' --filter '@justjs/pm-connect' --filter '@justjs/image-connect' --filter '@justjs/component-view' --filter '@justjs/platform-mobile' --filter '@justjs/platform-desktop' --filter '@justjs/platform-native' --filter '@justjs/vite' --filter '@justjs/ssr' --filter '@justjs/build' --filter '@justjs/osi-layers-integration' typecheck

_comment_build_order: bun's --filter runs matched packages concurrently with no dependency-graph awareness, so build/typecheck are split into explicit sequential phases matching the real @justjs/* dependency graph (network/data/@justscript-core -> transport -> application -> everything else -> hello-justjs) - confirmed necessary by reproducing a real failure from a genuinely clean checkout (no stale dist/ or .tsbuildinfo), not assumed.
